response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two songs from on-screen text: '下層' and 'モエチャッカファイア'.
2. Performed web searches for both songs.
3. For '下層', no clear official lyric page was found with the provided metadata, so lyrics set to null.
4. For 'モエチャッカファイア', found Japanese lyrics and English translations via search results.
5. Performer identification based on visual recognition of characters (Akai Haato, Hyakumantenbara Salome) and on-screen text.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue segment followed by a two-song musical performance by virtual idol Akai Haato and her guest, Hyakumantenbara Salome.

scenes.description: Opening segment with dialogue between Akai Haato and a man in a room filled with various dolls.
Akai Haato and Hyakumantenbara Salome perform the song '下層' (Kasou). On-screen text indicates the song title and creators.
Dialogue segment between Akai Haato and Hyakumantenbara Salome following their performance.
Instrumental break with dance performance by Akai Haato and another performer.
Akai Haato and another performer sing 'モエチャッカファイア' (MoeChakkaFire). Text on screen indicates the title.
scenes.song_title: モエチャッカファイア
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ようこそお越しなさったご主人様
隣に座ってせーの 萌萌萌萌
こんなんで誰が喜ぶのさ
ねぇ教えて 笑顔で up...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome home, master
Come sit with me, and moe moe moe moe
Who is this even for?
Hey, tell me, with a smile, up and down...
